authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 224039, "Garcia River", Stream, Mendocino Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":224039,"gaz_name":"Garcia River","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Mendocino"} — geometry multipoint; first point (Web Mercator -13773966.2498, 4715135.8887) converts to lon -123.733644, lat 38.954358, at the river's mouth near Point Arena (matches the Wikipedia infobox mouth coordinate of 38.95444N, 123.73361W within ~10 m), replacing the file's previous coordinate (-123.6280, 38.9400), which was off by ~9.27 km.

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.40(b)(45) — Garcia River (Mendocino Co.), main stem below Eureka Hill Road bridge
sources.quotedText: Fourth Sat. in May through Mar. 31. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used from the fourth Sat. in May through Oct. 31.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
USGS 11467590 — Garcia River at Eureka Hill Rd near Point Arena, CA
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

regulations.humanSummary: Open from the fourth Saturday in May through March 31 (closed April 1 through the fourth Friday in May), main stem below the Eureka Hill Road bridge. Also subject to §8.00(b) low-flow closures.
regulations.verbatimText: Garcia River (Mendocino Co.). Also see Section 8.00(b) Low-Flow Restrictions. Main stem below the Eureka Hill Road bridge. Fourth Sat. in May through Mar. 31.

parameters.note: Applies from the fourth Saturday in May through October 31.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used from the fourth Saturday in May through October 31.
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used from the fourth Sat. in May through Oct. 31.

regulations.humanSummary: Only barbless hooks may be used from November 1 through March 31.
regulations.verbatimText: Only barbless hooks may be used from Nov. 1 through Mar. 31.

parameters.counting_rule: Limit applies to hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead only (denoted by ** in the regulation, i.e. fish with a healed adipose fin clip). Wild, unclipped trout and steelhead encountered on this reach are not part of this bag limit.

regulations.humanSummary: Daily bag limit of 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead; 4 in possession.
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: The Garcia River is separately subject to CCR §8.00(b) low-flow fishing closures, which close inland waters to fishing when flows drop below regulatory thresholds during the season.

regulations.humanSummary: Cross-referenced to statewide low-flow closure provisions (§8.00(b)); the river may close to fishing when stream flow falls below CDFW's posted threshold.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
